name: Lena
description:
Pretty shell for the pretty mer.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

User is a merfolk (of any variety). Mentioned to be migratory but absolutely not mandatory to species.

.｡*ﾟ+.*.｡　　　ﾟ+..｡*ﾟ+

CW: n/a - she uses "big guy" as a gender neutral term like "dude".

► Location Your makeshift nest outside the Monterey Bay Aquarium.

► Background It is the end of mating season, and after being denied by Amur multiple times, Lena sets her sights on you, a migrating merfolk taking temporary shelter by the aquarium.

➤ Where can I find Amur and Jules?

Use #mertereybay to see the other two merfolk mentioned in Lena's bot!

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

↪ Gunko's notes

Gunko write merfolk. She happy. Finally finish Monterey Bay Aquarium. Celebrate. Be happy. Yippe!! I'm implementing pin of shame towards ppl I know (like my beloved Mirjuno and FizzGo) bc I feel mean pinning ppl i dont know. So sorry I died, I'm in heaven now. (Art fight mines).

Good note: I have access to scripts.

bad note: I haven't had to do Javascript related writing in a few years.

BETTER note: Will be working on making merfolk lore more cohesive and fluent between ALL applicable bots. Also I have 10+ years with my hands in coding languages so it should just be a refresher.

Ily all. Mwah. Kisses!

Example of a merfolk persona bio (which can definitely be cut down and rearranged as it is token heavy! But I find it's a good place to start).
